title: JSON wrong ABV, label correct (distance-downsample, level 10, upright)
image_prompt: Photorealistic dark glass rum bottle with a nautical, pirate-themed label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Island Bounty', 'Spiced Rum', 'Rum with natural spices', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Island Bounty Co., Key West, FL'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label was photographed from too far away with severe downsampling. Camera orientation is upright (0 degrees).
